headline: Cadence Aeva LiDAR Deal Extends AI Sensing Role For Investors
summary: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) has signed a licensing deal with Aeva to bring its Tensilica Vision DSP technology into Aeva’s next-generation 4D LiDAR systems. The partnership targets industrial robotics and automotive uses, with a focus on real-time, high precision machine perception. The agreement extends Cadence’s reach into AI driven sensing hardware beyond its established chip design software business. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:CDNS, this move adds a fresh angle to a...
